title: Block Tech Drip Bear Black | Urban 252-Piece Building Brick Art Set for Kids Age 6+ | Cool Collectible Gift for Boys, Teens and Adults | Creative Construction Toy
features: Bold Urban Style – The Block Tech Drip Bear Black brings a street-art inspired look to building fun, blending sleek black bricks with neon highlights and colourful detailing. With 252 pieces, it’s a hands-on project that results in a striking collectible display piece perfect for shelves or desks.

Mix & Match Compatibility – Designed to connect with all leading brick brands, this set allows young builders to customise their Drip Bear or combine it with other builds. Smooth-fitting pieces ensure frustration-free play and hours of imaginative creativity.

Perfect Gift for Teens & Collectors – From birthday surprises to Secret Santa exchanges, the Drip Bear Black makes a unique and eye-catching present. Its edgy design appeals to boys, teens and adults who appreciate cool, creative builds that double as décor.

Certified Safe & Durable – CE and UKCA certified for ages 6+, every piece is crafted from durable, non-toxic plastic. Includes full instructions and sticker sheet for an easy, confident build. Warning: not suitable for children under 36 months due to small parts.

Build. Display. Admire. – Ideal for rainy days, Christmas morning or family game night, this building kit offers both entertainment and style. Once complete, the Drip Bear Black becomes a modern art-inspired statement piece that shows off creativity and individuality.
description: Product description Bring street art to life with the Block Tech Drip Bear Black, a 252-piece building set designed for creators who love unique, modern builds. Each brick fits smoothly with leading brands, encouraging endless combinations and imaginative play. The finished bear’s mix of glossy black tones and colourful details makes it perfect for display or gifting. Great for birthdays, Secret Santa, or just a weekend build challenge, this CE and UKCA certified kit guarantees safe, creative fun for kids and collectors alike. Directions Instructions on how to build the Drip Bear Black set are included with the product. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 6 See more
